parents.subject: LU-6872 lov: avoid infinite loop in lsm_alloc_plain()

commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: perform sanity-lfsck test
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: perform sanity-lfsck test

This patch is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=sles11sp3 ossdistro=sles11sp3 mdsdistro=sles11sp3 \
mdtcount=1 testlist=sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
mdtcount=1 testlist=sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck,sanity-lfsck

Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
